chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D- 90 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For katcha Peshi 2. For hearing of MA No 418/2018 13.02.2018. Mr. Kanji Mal Advocate for the petitioners Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto Asstt:A.G a/w SIP Ghulam Nabi P.S.Chamber on behalf of SHO P.S.Chamber -=-=- Learned counsel for the petitioners, under the instructions of petitioners does not press this constitutional petition which is dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed application. JUDGE JUDGE A.Rasheed/steno
